# lattice_external_auth (Data Source)

Use this data source to require users to authenticate with an external service prior to agent creation. This can be used to [pre-authenticate external services](https://lattice.dev/docs/admin/external-auth) in a agent. (e.g. Google Cloud, Github, Docker, etc.)

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "lattice" {}


data "lattice_external_auth" "github" {
  id = "github"
}

data "lattice_external_auth" "azure-identity" {
  id       = "azure-identiy"
  optional = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of a configured external auth provider set up in your Lattice deployment.

### Optional

- `optional` (Boolean) Authenticating with the external auth provider is not required, and can be skipped by users when creating or updating agents

### Read-Only

- `access_token` (String) The access token returned by the external auth provider. This can be used to pre-authenticate command-line tools.
